issue_summary: Remove hack, as JFlex trunk now has the zzBuffer bug fixed
javadoc_before: /** * Resets the scanner to read from a new input stream. * Does not close the old reader. * * All internal variables are reset, the old input stream * cannot be reused (internal buffer is discarded and lost). * Lexical state is set to ZZ_INITIAL. * * @param reader the new input stream */
javadoc_after: /** * Resets the scanner to read from a new input stream. * Does not close the old reader. * * All internal variables are reset, the old input stream * cannot be reused (internal buffer is discarded and lost). * Lexical state is set to ZZ_INITIAL. * * Internal scan buffer is resized down to its initial length, if it has grown. * * @param reader the new input stream */
